plugins.name: deslop
plugins.description: Removes AI-generated code slop from code changes in the current branch

plugins.name: dig
plugins.description: Deep exploratory interview to discover unknowns and strengthen plans

plugins.name: fix-ci
plugins.description: Automatically diagnose and fix CI failures using sub-agent exploration

plugins.name: decomposition
plugins.description: Decompose complex tasks into detailed, actionable todos with rich descriptions. Each todo is specific, achievable, and small enough to execute independently.

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Unified code review using Codex CLI (always) and optionally Cursor Agent CLI. Cross-references, debates, and applies fixes.

plugins.name: clean-code
plugins.description: Post-implementation code quality polishing. Runs simplify, deslop, then comment accuracy and dead-code checks.
